name: sys-rs
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libunwind-dev libclang-dev llvm-dev strace wget autoconf automake libtool pkg-config && curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain nightly --no-modify-path && ~/.cargo/bin/rustup component add clippy rustfmt
